completed_tasks.name: Guide page (/guide): problem + 'Meaning, not wording' (semantic, Harmony link) + verdicts + 'Where AI is used' + 'You're in the loop' (EITL+confidence) + Learn more links

New-run form: blank columns (no auto-detect), primary/advanced split, format hints, itemized cost estimate (estimateRunCostBreakdown, anchored $1.45 batch/7451 fields), side-by-side layout (mockup)

Deploy static preview for team feedback
